title: helianthus × intermedius
intro: Helianthus × intermedius, also known as intermediate sunflower or hybrid sunflower, is a hybrid plant derived from the crossing of Helianthus annuus and Helianthus debilis. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Helianthus × intermedius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flower, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
